full_text:
Heat sears poor neighbourhoods as Karnataka's response falls short
Vulnerable residents across Karnataka face extreme heat with limited access to water, shelter and basic services, exposing gaps in planning and preparedness
Houses with asbestos and corrugated tin roofs record daytime temperatures about 6°C higher and night-time temperatures 2 to 3°C higher than the ambient temperatures. In pic a family living in a house with asbestos-cement roofs in Bengaluru. DH PHOTO/PUSHKAR V
